computeEnvPlatform.description: Compute environment platform used for the workflow run. Can be `null` for CLI-submitted runs.

labels.description: Array of resource labels attached to the workflow. Can be `null`.

orgName.description: Organization name associated with the workspace. Can be `null`.

pipelineId.description: Pipeline numeric identifier associated with the workflow run. Can be `null` for CLI-submitted runs.

pipelineName.description: Pipeline name associated with the workflow run. Can be `null` for CLI-submitted runs.

revision.description: Source control revision, branch, or tag used for the workflow run. Can be `null`.

userId.description: User numeric identifier for the workflow run owner.

userName.description: Username for the workflow run owner.

userOrganization.description: Organization name associated with the workflow run owner. Can be `null`.

workspaceFullName.description: Full workspace name including organization prefix. Can be `null` for personal context runs.

workspaceId.description: Workspace numeric identifier for the workflow run. Can be `null` for personal context runs.

workspaceName.description: Workspace name for the workflow run. Can be `null` for personal context runs.

metadata.description: Platform metadata returned so Nextflow can populate workflow metadata without additional API calls. Can be `null`.
